title: VoucherVision 用 Gemini 1.5 Pro 读取自然历史标本标签并结构化转录

targets.title: GitHub - Gene-Weaver/VoucherVision: Initiated by the University of Michigan Herbarium, VoucherVision harnesses the power of large language models (LLMs) to transform the transcription process of natural history specimen labels. · GitHub
